title: XIFT v1.0 Extension: ontology
description: Governed vocabulary descriptor (silently-ignorable extension, Mechanism B). The block carries ONLY the sender's own vocabulary descriptor; bilateral alignment cells ($defs/alignment_cell) are produced by the Channel-7 SCS loop and carried in the signed synopsis, not in this envelope block. Source: xift-1.0-spec-extension-ontology.md §2, §3.
x-xift-jcs-note: JCS signing (RFC 8785, core §8.3): this block is canonicalized as part of the envelope and signed in full (Ed25519). alignment_score (in $defs/alignment_cell) is the only float-bearing field; the JCS pre-signing canonicalizer MUST reject NaN, +Infinity, -Infinity and -0.0 as protocol:crypto:canonicalization_failed (102). JSON Schema cannot express this, so it is enforced at canonicalization time, not here.

context_iri.description: Dereferenceable JSON-LD 1.1 @context for the sender's vocabulary (spec §3.1).

format.description: Serialization of the declared vocabulary (spec §3.1); MUST be one the emitter advertised (channel-1 §4).

skos_projection.description: OPTIONAL reduced SKOS view; a PARTIAL taxonomy, never the full graph (spec §3.1.1).

concepts.x-xift-note: maxItems reflects the default ontology_projection_max_concepts (spec §6); a deployment MAY lower it. The privacy invariant (full graph NOT recoverable) is enforced at egress, not here.

shacl_shapes.description: OPTIONAL SHACL shapes constraining the vocabulary; MAY be null (spec §3.1).

alignment_cell.description: SSSOM-inspired flat correspondence record, produced by the Channel-7 SCS loop and carried in the signed synopsis (spec §3.2). Not part of this envelope block.

score_function.x-xift-note: Spec §3.3.1 invariant not expressible in pure JSON Schema: a model-tier score_function (llm_calibrated) implies method == llm-assisted. Enforce in code.
